itemReviewed.name: D Y Patil International School - Charoli Bk.

address.streetAddress: DY Patil Road, Charholi Budruk, JWC6+F25, Via, Lohegaon, Pune, Maharashtra 412105, India

itemListElement.reviewBody: Worst leaving school experience. They charge for rights of student, since when does the original tranfer certificate have a charge, well in this school they have 1,000rs just for a hard copy and stamp along with signs. And for stamp and signature plus additional extra fee. It is unbelievable that they will "force" you to pay for something the school is responsible of the institution nature. During the admission  they treat well .

itemReviewed.name: D Y Patil International School - Charoli Bk.

itemListElement.reviewBody:
Excellent School....No worries.
As off from past 6 years and on-going, school administration and management is great. Excelent teaching, sports, activities and lots of activities boosted from this year 2020-2021. Obviously, for progress of kids, school is providing lots of opportunities but as a parent's responsibility we must catch every opportunity on right time. Teachers are very good, managing well in covid-19 pandemic situation and can teach sudents but we must take responsibility to polish our kids. There is no magic in any school which can improve students in a couple of years. I belive its parents responsibility too to understand and sink with school activities. No need of tution if learning in D. Y. P.I.S. last line school can hold one hand of kid and we must hold others....then only balance can be maintained for development of kid as a good learner, good listener, good person and not a competitor. Many parents changes schools frequently with reason of "degraded teaching". I would like to inform to such parents that spare 30 minutes everyday for kid and see the magic. Problems not always at school side, sometime we need to walk by kids psycology too.

itemReviewed.name: D Y Patil International School - Charoli Bk.

itemListElement.reviewBody: One of the best schools in Pune. Every child is given personal attention in this school. Here , teachers are very close to children and their parents. Open house meetings are conducted on regular basis . Students are honoured on their best performances.The atmosphere in the school is quite friendly. Here medical health check is also done on regular basis. It's a very good school,where family values are taught.

itemReviewed.name: D Y Patil International School - Charoli Bk.

itemListElement.reviewBody: I moved from Nagpur to Pune thanks to my job. Awesome experience when I visited with my son. The admission procedure, the continued interactions and support from the Admin staff has been very commendable. I am sure this is the best choice for my children and wish good luck to the school management and thanks especially to Principal Ma'am.

itemReviewed.name: D Y Patil International School - Charoli Bk.

itemListElement.reviewBody: We are associated with DYPIS since last 3 years.I am very happy with School as a parent.My child is getting best education in Pune.
